zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon de Pyn於1217年12月出生在英國薩默塞特巴斯時，他的父親Herbert de Pyn23歲，母親Lady de Pyn48歲。他與Margery Fylegh結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1264年5月14日在英國英格蘭素可列維斯享年46歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Pine  . This name has been established in Ireland since the 16th century.

variants.name: Pine
meanings: English: from Middle English pin(e) (Old English pīn, Old French pin), a topographic name for someone who lived by a conspicuous pine tree or in a pine forest; in some cases it may originally have been a nickname for a tall man, one thought to resemble a pine tree.
English: nickname from Middle English pine ‘pain, injury, torture, punishment, infirmity’, referring to someone who suffered from an inflicted pain or punishment.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Le Pin in Calvados or some other French place called from a prominent pine.

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon de Pyn was born in December 1217, in Bath, Somerset, England, his father, Herbert de Pyn, was 23 and his mother, Lady de Pyn, was 48. He married Margery Fylegh. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 14 May 1264, in Lewes, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 46.

Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 14 mai 1264, à Lewes, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Simon de Pyn(이)가 1217년 12월 영국 서머세트 바스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Herbert de Pyn(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady de Pyn(은)는 48세였다. 그는 Margery Fylegh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1264년 5월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 루스에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.
